variants.title: Donaldson P550080 Lube Cartridge
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P550080 Lube Cartridge is designed to provide reliable performance in lube cartridge applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
specifications: Style: Lube Cartridge, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 16µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 104.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 32.0 mm, Length: 170.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 16µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose
